'''âh-k-l-ng''' ('''kahaklengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jacobinise|jacobinise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jacobinise|jacobinise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-k-l-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kahaklengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihaklengoko|thihaklengoko]] || [[word:jihaklengoko|jihaklengoko]] || [[word:shihaklengoko|shihaklengoko]] || [[word:kihaklengoko|kihaklengoko]]
|-
